event: Still life with flowers and fish
description: An expressionist still life painting with a dark, heavily textured surface. A vase with red flowers stands at center, rendered with thick impasto brushstrokes. In front of it lies a fish with visible scales and a prominent eye. A red-orange bowl or fruit sits to the left. The entire composition is set against a very dark background, with the objects emerging from shadow through patches of red, green, pink, and white paint. The brushwork is agitated and visceral.
